title: Wireless conferencing system and collaboration method thereof
abstract: A wireless conferencing system for wirelessly connecting a computerized device with a display device includes at least a data transmitter. The data transmitter includes a transmitter self-powered unit, a data transmission module electrically powered by the transmitter self-powered unit, and a computer interface communicatively lined to the data transmission module, wherein when the computer interface is configured for detachably connecting to the computerized device, the data transmission module is powered and ready for wirelessly transmitting data from the computerized device to the display device without consuming power of the computerized device.
claims: 1. A wireless conferencing system for wirelessly connecting at least one computerized device with at least one display device, comprising: one or more data transmitters, each comprising a data transmission module, configured for transmitting data from the at least one computerized device to the at least one display device, a built-in encoding unit configured to encode the data before transmitting; one or more data receivers, each of said one or more data receivers comprising: a display interface for detachably connecting to the at least one display device, a data receiving module wirelessly linked to said one or more data transmitters for wirelessly receiving the data from said computerized device, and a built-in decoding unit configured to decode the data transmitted from said data transmission module; and a control base selectively activating said data transmitter and said data receiver to form a closed private network.
